name: wazuh-secops
description: Reusable Wazuh SecOps skills and package core for Linux host monitoring, lateral analysis, and controlled Active Response.

interface.shortDescription: Wazuh Linux monitoring and security operations skills.
interface.longDescription: Portable Wazuh skills and reusable package core for agent-driven Linux host monitoring, lateral movement analysis, and approval-bound Active Response operations.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Wazuh Linux agent's network posture.
Map exposed services across Wazuh-managed Linux hosts.
Triage recent Wazuh rule hits and alert activity.
Analyze possible lateral movement with Wazuh.
Prepare a Wazuh IP block with approval.
